name: addicted-to-the-monkey-mind
description: J.F. Benoist's Addicted to the Monkey Mind — recognize the programmed reactive voice driving your patterns of self-sabotage and activate the Observing Mind to rewrite the beliefs that run your life
useCase: Helps users break free from automatic patterns and childhood programming by distinguishing the reactive Monkey Mind from the calm Observing Mind, investigating belief origins, and consciously rewriting internal programs.
knownRisks: Tracing childhood programming can surface difficult emotions — users should go at their own pace
The book's framework complements but does not replace professional therapy for deep trauma
